metadata.name: SpecAnatomy
metadata.displayName: The anatomy of a screen spec
metadata.description: Field-by-field dictionary of screen_spec.json: metadata, structure, stateManagement, dataFlow, userActions, validation, transitions, relatedFiles, notes. v1 lands as a scaffold under docs/plans/spec-authoring-deep-dive.md Phase 1; prose + CodeBlocks per section expand in Phase 1b.

uiVariables.name: nextReadLinks
uiVariables.description: Two follow-up cards pointing at split-overview and writing-your-first-spec.

dataFlow.diagram:
flowchart TD
    VIEW[SpecAnatomyView] --> VM[SpecAnatomyViewModel]
    VM -- nextReadLinks --> VIEW

methods.name: onAppear
methods.description: Seed nextReadLinks from the module-scope NEXT_READ_ENTRIES catalog. Each row's titleKey / descriptionKey resolves through StringManager with the spec_anatomy_ namespace prefix.

relatedFiles.description: Essay layout — field-dictionary structure per spec section.
Same shape as concepts essay VMs.

notes: First article under the new Spec section (docs/plans/spec-authoring-deep-dive.md).
v1 scaffold: header + 5 section headings (top-level, metadata, stateManagement, dataFlow, structure) + next-reads. Prose bodies and CodeBlocks expand in Phase 1b.
Purpose: complement the Reference > JSON Schema lookup view with a writer-facing walk through every top-level spec field.
